name: qodeflow-saphana
title: SAP HANA
description: Integrates with SAP HANA to execute SQL queries, DML statements, and stored procedures

settings.name: dsn
settings.description: Full SAP HANA DSN (e.g. hdb://user:password@host:39017). If provided, host/port/user/password are ignored.

settings.name: host
settings.description: SAP HANA server hostname or IP address

input.name: method
input.description: The operation to perform: QUERY (SELECT), EXEC (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE), or CALL (stored procedure)

input.name: query
input.description: The SQL statement or stored procedure call to execute

input.name: args
input.description: Optional positional arguments to bind to the query placeholders (?)

output.name: result
output.description: Rows returned by a QUERY or CALL operation, each row as a key-value map

output.name: rowsAffected
output.description: Number of rows affected (EXEC) or returned (QUERY/CALL)
